registerPBS: Register a Proxmox Backup Server to manage backups.
pbsUnreachableDesc: Could not connect to the PBS server. Check credentials and connectivity.
failedLoadPBS: Failed to load PBS data. Check server connectivity.
gcDescription: This will start garbage collection on datastore {{store}}. This removes unreferenced chunks and reclaims disk space.
deleteSnapshotConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{snapshot}} from {{datastore}}? This action cannot be undone.
startBackupDesc: Start a vzdump backup on the selected cluster.
restoreDesc: Restore {{type}}/{{id}} from {{datastore}} to a PVE node.
noPBSStorage: No PBS storage found on this PVE cluster. The PBS server must be added as a storage in PVE (Datacenter > Storage > Add > Proxmox Backup Server) before you can restore.
autoSelectedNode: Auto-selected {{node}} — VM {{vmid}} exists on this node.
defaultsToOriginal: Defaults to the original VMID. Change to restore as a new VM.
overwriteWarning: This will stop VM {{vmid}} and overwrite it with the backup. This cannot be undone.
deletePBSConfirm: This will permanently remove {{name}} and all associated backup data (snapshots, sync jobs, verify jobs, metrics). Type the server name to confirm.
